Package nonprofitbookkeeping.service

Class DonorService

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.service.DonorService
public class DonorService extends Object
Service class for managing DonorContact information. This class provides functionalities to add, edit, remove, and retrieve donor data. Donor information is stored in an in-memory list.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DonorService()
    Constructs a new DonorService.
    DonorService(DonorRepository repository)

  • Constructor Details

    • DonorService

      public DonorService()
      Constructs a new DonorService. Initializes an empty list to store donors.

    • DonorService

      DonorService(DonorRepository repository)

  • Method Details

    • addDonor

      public void addDonor(DonorContact donor)
      Adds a new donor to the service.
      Parameters:
      donor - The DonorContact object to add. Must not be null.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if donor is null (due to ArrayList behavior).

    • editDonor

      public boolean editDonor(String donorId, DonorContact updatedDonor)
      Edits an existing donor's information identified by name. Only the basic contact fields are currently updated from updatedDonor.
      Parameters:
      donorName - The name of the donor to edit.
      updatedDonor - A DonorContact object containing the updated information.
      Returns:
      true if a donor with the given name was found and updated, false otherwise.

    • removeDonor

      public boolean removeDonor(String donorId)
      Removes a donor from the service by their name.
      Parameters:
      donorName - The name of the donor to remove.
      Returns:
      true if a donor with the given name was found and removed, false otherwise.

    • getAllDonors

      public List<DonorContact> getAllDonors()
      Retrieves a list of all donors currently managed by this service.
      Returns:
      A new ArrayList containing all DonorContact objects. This is a copy, so modifications to the returned list will not affect the internal storage. Returns an empty list if no donors are present.

    • saveDonors

      public void saveDonors(File companyDirectory) throws IOException
      Saves all donors to a JSON file located in the given company directory.
      Parameters:
      companyDirectory - directory where the donors file should be written
      Throws:
      IOException - if writing fails or the directory is invalid

    • loadDonors

      public void loadDonors(File companyDirectory) throws IOException
      Loads donors from a JSON file located in the given company directory. Existing in-memory donors are cleared before loading new ones. If the file does not exist, this method simply returns with an empty list.
      Parameters:
      companyDirectory - directory where the donors file is located
      Throws:
      IOException - if reading fails or the directory is invalid
